Notes from Neurotica

  • Archive

Biblical Violence (Free Verse)


Drink generously from the chalice, The poison of contempt will flow free; Go, wash your wounds in the Dead Sea, Leave your skin scared and callous.

Find the underbelly of your desire, Let it be flayed and flagellated; Do not let weakness transpire, Feverish impulses are castrated.

Sinful nature still takes root, Your state is one of wickedness; Strike at it with measures absolute, Kill your will with impetus!

Finally comes feelings of simple bliss, Chance for a new cerebral genesis, Yet buried thoughts being to reminisce, The mind isolates within the chaotic abyss.

Lone tyrant of the soul, the conquistador, Doomed to spend your days alone; The kingdom built under the stress of civil war, Now dreams of the day it is overthrown.

īn nīz bogzarad
